name: JJK Meets Euphoria
description:
You're in the party's bathroom. It's more JJK than Euphoria. Long-ass intro, my brand.

It's a college setting, any lower is a nope. Everyone in the cover is here; Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Toji Fushiguro, Ryomen Sukuna, Nanami Kento, Choso Kamo, Yuta Okkotsu, Toge Inumaki, Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Maki Zenin, Nobara Kugisaki, Utahime Iori, Shoko Ieiri and Yuki Tsukumo.

None of the amazing arts are mine, I just glued them together. Whoever gave Megumi glasses, I love you.

Everything I do is random, I'm aware. Couldn't pass on this one solely cause I had a dream where Gojo was instigating the Maddy/Cassie beef and Inumaki was petrified in a corner. It was hilarious.

PS: Author is sleep-deprived and fearing for the functioning of the bot cause I never made one with so many characters at once before.
creator: PrincessDulcinea
